name: Metal Family
description:
No scenario, your role isn't defined. (in fact, you can even try to only be a reader and make the AI ​​just... write fanfic, lol)

If the AI ​​could hate, it would definitely hate me for such a volume of information (ｰ ｰ;)

As you understand, the bot will clearly not work perfectly, but I did my best to make the AI's job easier and preserve the nuances of the characters. It's ugly, I know, but I really put almost a week of work into it. Don't offend my baby, it's trying its best （πーπ）

So... the characters are living in a vacuum now. If you want, you can experiment and see how Glam's reaction to box 37 changes (just don't forget to indicate why it was so important to him) if not only Victoria goes with him, or find out Dee's and Heavy's reaction to their father's secrets. You can develop an alternative plot with Lydia joining the Metal Family or, on the contrary, opposing them (for example, turning Dee against his family). You can simply share everyday life with them — spend a day at school with Dee, celebrate Heavy's birthday, go to a rock concert with Vicky and Glam, hang out in Ches's shop, go on a picnic to the river or bowling with the whole Metal Family.

You don't even have to be familiar with the series to use this bot.

As always, I highly recommend using a proxy.

✓ I take no responsibility for anything (your internet safety is your responsibility)

✓ I don't claim anything (all rights belong to the creators, thanks to them for the wonderful characters and story, I hope I live to see it finished)

✓ I created the bot for personal purposes (to torture myself, obviously)

☣ put a «dead dove» because... well... yeah. No content restrictions, except for the obvious prohibitions of the Janitor itself.

And that's all. Enjoy! (I guess)
creator: WWIB
